untranslatable_reason: Signal requires OLS regression residuals, rolling z-score calculation, cointegration testing (ADF test), and mean-reversion confirmation. These advanced statistical computations are not available in the allowed indicator list. The strategy also requires pair cointegration analysis which cannot be expressed with single-instrument indicators. While z-score thresholds have been approximated using returns as a proxy, the core logic (residual-based mean reversion from cointegrated pairs) cannot be fully translated.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using log_returns as proxy for z-score residuals with thresholds ±1.5 for entry and ±0.25 for exit, and 2.5 for stop-loss. However, this loses the essential components: (1) OLS regression on cointegrated pairs, (2) ADF test validation, (3) residual extraction, and (4) rolling z-score normalization. The signal cannot be accurately implemented without custom statistical indicators for pair trading residuals.
